tender.description: Renewal by SDBC on the following motor roads under Vikasnagar Constituency under Annual Repair (i) Lambarpur Barotiwala Vikasnagar road (ii) Laxmipur Barotiwala Ambadi road (iii) From Vikasnagar to Dakpathar No. 1 Bridge motor road.
